title: Sour Portuguese Rice Paella
description: A tangy, crispy take on traditional Portuguese paella, made with jasmine rice and a lacquer-glaze.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the red onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Add the jasmine rice and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
While the rice is cooking, mix the lacquer glaze and lime juice in a small bowl.
Once the rice is done, remove from heat and stir in the lacquer glaze mixture and chopped cilantro.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer to a serving platter and serve hot.
